zh.lifeSummary: 當Christiana Cottingham於1437年出生在英國英格蘭爾麗婭 白 南特維其時，她的父親Thomas Cottingham20歲，母親Matida Ellen Spurstowe25歲。她於1455年與Hugh Calveley在英國英格蘭爾麗婭 白 巴福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1517年在英國英格蘭爾麗婭 白 巴福德享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christiana Cottingham于1437年出生在英国英格兰爾麗婭 白 南特維其时，她的父亲Thomas Cottingham20岁，母亲Matida Ellen Spurstowe25岁。她于1455年与Hugh Calveley在英国英格兰爾麗婭 白 巴福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1517年在英国英格兰爾麗婭 白 巴福德享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cottingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Cottingham (‘homestead (Old English hām) of the people of (Old English -inga-) of a man named Cott or Cotta’), one in East Yorkshire and one in Northamptonshire.

nameMeanings.name: Christiana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval learned feminine form of Christian . As a recent revival it represents an elaborated form of Christina . It is also sometimes spelled Christianna , under the influence of the name Anna .

en.lifeSummary: When Christiana Cottingham was born in 1437, in Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Cottingham, was 20 and her mother, Matida Ellen Spurstowe, was 25. She married Hugh Calveley in 1455, in Lea by Backford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 9 daughters. She died in 1517, in Lea by Backford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christiana Cottingham est née en 1437, à Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Cottingham, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Matida Ellen Spurstowe, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Calveley en 1455, à Lea by Backford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée en 1517, à Lea by Backford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

Sie hat 1455 in Lea by Backford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Hugh Calveley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 9 Töchter. Sie starb 1517 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Lea by Backford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Christiana Cottingham(이)가 1437년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 리아 비 난트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Cottingham(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matida Ellen Spurstowe(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1455년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 리아 비 바ck퍼드에서 Hugh Calveley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1517년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 리아 비 바ck퍼드에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Hugh Calveley em 1455, em Lea by Backford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 9 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christiana Cottingham родилась в 1437 г. в местности леа би нантвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Cottingham было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Matida Ellen Spurstowe, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Calveley в 1455 г. в местности леа би баккфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 9 дочерей. Она умерла в 1517 г. в местности леа би баккфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.
